# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: LinkerdServer
metadata:
  name: linkerd-server
spec:
  namespaceSelector: {}
  podSelector: {}

---

apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-authorization
spec:
  selectors:
    - selector: cluster.local/default/my-service1
      allow:
        to:
          - cluster.local/default/my-service2
    - selector: cluster.local/default/my-service2
      allow:
        to:
          - cluster.local/default/my-service1

---

apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: port-based-authorization
spec:
  selectors:
    - selector: cluster.local/default/my-service1
      allow:
        onPort: 8080
        to:
          - cluster.local/default/my-service2
          - cluster.local/default/my-service3

---

apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-account-based-authorization
spec:
  selectors:
    - selector: cluster.local/default/my-service1
      allow:
        fromServiceAccount: my-sa-1
        to:
          - cluster.local/default/my-service2
    - selector: cluster.local/default/my-service2
      allow:
        fromServiceAccount: my-sa-2
        to:
          - cluster.local/default/my-service1
